signup.description: Create a CUT account by entering your email along with a CNC number (recommended) or Siret
signup.siretOrCNCRequired: Please enter a CNC number (recommended) or Siret
signup.Unknown CNC: This CNC code is not recognised. Please check your entry or contact support if you believe this is an error.
signup.Unknown SIRET or CNC: This Siret or CNC code is not recognised. Please check your entry or contact support if you believe this is an error.
signup.Not authorized: This email is already registered with a CUT account, or there was a problem creating it. Feel free to check <link>the FAQ</link> or contact <support>support</support> if you believe this is an error.

validation.siretOrCNC: Please enter a CNC number (recommended) or Siret

collaborators.title: My Collaborators
collaborators.message: Here you will find the list of people authorised to work on your various carbon footprints

footprints.title: My Footprints
footprints.message: Create your first footprint here. You can then view your footprints or create new ones at any time.

sites.title: My Cinemas
sites.message: Here you will find the list of establishments linked to your account

home.title: Calculating your simplified carbon footprint will allow you to:

alert.info: The Count calculator lets you estimate the climate impact of your activity. It is above all an awareness-raising tool. It is not a low-carbon transition approach but a simplified carbon footprint — in the sense of the <link>Guide to communicating about carbon accounting</link> — focused on the main emission categories linked to cinema operations.

info.0: Understand the impact assessment of your establishment
info.2: In the long term, and through more in-depth work, build a reduction trajectory

study.firstSimplifiedStudyMessage: It is time to get started! We invite you to create your first Footprint.
study.validatedOnlyDescription: For each footprint, one or more validators can be defined. They are responsible for validating the emission sources once these have been filled in by the study's contributors and editors. By default, only validated emissions appear in your results, but you can change this behaviour via the "Settings" menu.
study.selectSite: Before filling in the data, choose a cinema

new.title: Information about the new footprint
new.name: Footprint name

info.date: Estimates are generally made over a 12-month period

glossary.studyDatesDescription: Please indicate the reference period covered by your simplified carbon footprint. Ideally, the reference period should be twelve months.

new.cncInfo: If you provided your cinema's CNC number, the data below is pre-filled with information from {year}. You can edit it if it is not up to date.

deleteDialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete {count, plural, =1 {this cinema} other {these cinemas}}?

results.simplifiedFeedback: Well done! You have just completed the simplified carbon footprint of your cinema. It is an excellent introduction to carbon accounting! Please kindly fill in <questionnaire>this questionnaire</questionnaire> to help us improve the tool and fix any bugs!

organization.noSites: There are no cinemas configured for the organisation

validation.sites: Please select at least one cinema involved in the study

sites.title: Which cinemas should the footprint cover?
sites.noSites: There are no cinemas configured for the organisation
sites.name: Name
sites.etpPlaceholder: Enter your number of FTEs for this cinema here
sites.caPlaceholder: Enter your revenue for this cinema in {unit} here

checklist.title: Getting started with COUNT
checklist.AddClientDetails: Add your first client to start your footprints
checklist.CreateFirstStudyDetails: Off you go with your first footprint! Fill in the initial information such as the date, the name...
checklist.CreateFirstEmissionSourceDetails: Go to the first category/sub-category you want to fill in! Answer the questions.
checklist.finished: You are ready to start using COUNT! Feel free to check the <faq>FAQ</faq> or contact us if needed.

role.ADMIN_description: An administrator has all rights over the organisation's account as well as over all of its studies (whether public or private).
role.DEFAULT_description: A collaborator can edit studies. They do not have access to the organisation's settings.

login.subtext: The first environmental impact calculator dedicated to cinemas.
login.explanation: This tool was developed by the association CUT! Cinéma Uni pour la Transition, in cooperation with ABC, the Association for Building the Low Carbon Transition.
login.question: A question? Read the <faq>FAQ</faq> or <support>contact us</support>!
login.explanation2: Operation supported by the French State under the “Soutenir les alternatives vertes 2” scheme of France 2030, operated by the Banque des Territoires (Caisse des Dépôts).

subject.newUser: You have been invited to Count
subject.addedActiveUser: You have been invited to a new Count environment
subject.activation: You have activated your Count account
subject.activationRequest: Request for access to your Count organisation

ressources.enSavoirPlusBilan: To go further than the simplified footprint calculation offered by Count:

questions.Electromenager: For each of these household appliances, please fill in:
questions.FretProvenance: Where is your main supplier based?
